---
title: "Arpan Acharya"
pagetitle: "Arpan Acharya"
description-meta: "Economist and researcher based in Kathmandu, working on applied econometrics, health economics, and development economics."
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:arpanacharya11.aa@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/acharyaarpan
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/arpan1acharya/
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: files/Arpan_Acharya_CV.pdf
---

I am a researcher based in Kathmandu, Nepal. I completed my Bachelor's in
Economics from **Kathmandu University** in 2024, where I also worked as a
Research Assistant at the Department of Economics after graduation. I am
currently a **consultant at the Nepal Health Economics Association (NHEA)**,
working on applied economic research in the health sector.

As an aspiring PhD student, my research interests lie in **causal inference**,
**development economics**, **political economy**, and **health economics**.
My current and past work has touched on health-sector efficiency,
sugar-sweetened beverage taxation, caste-based wage gaps, gender norms and
female labour force participation, and the political economy of conflict in
Nepal.

Eventually, I hope to pursue a PhD in Economics and return to work in
academia in Nepal.

→ Read more [about me](about.qmd), browse my [research](research.qmd), or have
a look at my [CV](cv.qmd).
